scripts.build: bun run db:generate && bun build src/index.ts src/seed.ts --outdir dist --target bun
scripts.start: bun run db:migrate:prod && bun dist/seed.js && bun dist/index.js
scripts.db:cleanup: bun -e "import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'; const p = new PrismaClient(); try { await p.\$executeRawUnsafe(\"DELETE FROM \\\"_prisma_migrations\\\" WHERE \\\"migration_name\\\" = '20260716043000_add_new_and_processing_statuses' AND \\\"finished_at\\\" IS NULL\"); console.log('Cleaned up failed migration entry'); } catch(e) { console.log('No failed migration to clean up:', e.message); } finally { await p.\$disconnect(); }"
scripts.db:migrate:prod: bun run db:cleanup && prisma migrate deploy
